title: Create migration 043: Add currentEmpCode columns to attendance_imports
description: Add columns for currentEmpCode to attendance_imports table: parsed_employee_code, resolved_nik, current_emp_code, current_employee_id, mapping_version

files.change: Add currentEmpCode and mapping_version columns to attendance_imports

implementation: Create migration file with IF NOT EXISTS checks
Add parsed_employee_code NVARCHAR(30) NULL to preserve original parsed code
Add resolved_nik NVARCHAR(30) NULL for NIK lookup
Add current_emp_code NVARCHAR(30) NULL for final resolved code
Add current_employee_id INT NULL for FK
Add mapping_version INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 for version tracking
Create index IX_imports_current_emp_code ON attendance_imports(current_emp_code) WHERE current_emp_code IS NOT NULL

reference.examples: Use IF NOT EXISTS pattern for columns and indexes

criteria: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='attendance_imports' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('parsed_employee_code','resolved_nik','current_emp_code','current_employee_id','mapping_version') returns 5
